benchmark.name: crypto-dashboard-bench
benchmark.objective: Compare end-to-end crypto product research, strategy, design, domain trust, visual execution, and frontend craft.

checks.detail: Configuration, rubric, ledger, and cycle artifacts validate.
16 included runs are finished with passing audits.
10 runs are retained as excluded because their route/build audit failed.
Included runs share the frozen prompt/content/rubric inputs.
Evidence, mapping, prompt instance, judge, and aggregate hashes agree.
25 logical transcript threads reconcile with zero token delta; pricing and USD costs are unavailable.
Local report/current targets are defined; external deployment is explicitly unavailable/not performed.

warnings: A shared React hydration warning was observed during capture; per-route attribution was not isolated.
Ten runs were excluded from the interim judging cohort after CSS/build/render audit failures.
Interaction probes and verified pricing were unavailable.
